name: borrower_name_present
expression: borrower_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(borrower_name)) > 0
description: Credit memo must identify the borrower.

name: commitment_amount_positive
description: Proposed commitment amount cannot be zero or negative when present.

name: risk_rating_present
expression: risk_rating_proposed IS NOT NULL OR risk_rating_current IS NOT NULL
description: Credit memos should include current or proposed risk rating.

name: approval_status_present
expression: approval_status IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(approval_status)) > 0
description: Approval status is needed to determine memo outcome.

name: policy_exceptions_array_valid
description: Policy exceptions should be captured as an array.
